name: 38_Object_Tracking_Siamese_OTB50_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kufuatilia vitu kwa kutumia mtandao wa Siamese na seti ya data ya OTB50. Seti ya data ya OTB50 inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kujumuisha hatua za kuongeza data kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, zinazofanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mtandao wa Siamese katika `src/model.py`. Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinapaswa kurekebishwa katika `src/train.py`. Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanapaswa kuhifadhiwa kama `results/tracking_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya ufuatiliaji kwa kutumia OpenCV na hifadhi video za ufuatiliaji chini ya `results/videos/`. Zaidi ya hayo, tengeneza ripoti kamili ya Markdown inayojumuisha maelezo ya usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na mchakato wa tathmini na ihifadhi kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unaweza kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo kwa matumizi rahisi. Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.
Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

preferences.criteria: Video za ufuatiliaji zinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika azimio la juu na kujumuisha maelezo yanayoonyesha kitu kinachofuatiliwa.
Hakikisha mfumo una uwezo wa kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo, kuruhusu matumizi rahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the OTB50 dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no real implementation of loading OTB50 data — no file paths, no actual dataset parsing, no use of any OTB50-specific data structures or libraries. The file merely lists OTB50 as a keyword string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS`, which is not equivalent to actually loading the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder function `build_transforms()` that returns a simple Python list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. This is not a real implementation of data augmentation — there is no actual use of libraries like `torchvision.transforms`, `albumentations`, or any other augmentation framework. No real rotation or scaling transformations are applied to any data. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and a "placeholder," confirming that no genuine data augmentation is implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual Siamese network implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual neural network architecture defined — no layers, no forward pass, no twin/siamese branches, no PyTorch/TensorFlow modules, or any real deep learning code that would constitute a Siamese network implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation with no actual hyperparameters defined or tuned. There is no learning rate, batch size, or any other hyperparameter present in the code. The `train()` function only performs a simple loop summing steps (`score += step`) with no model training logic whatsoever. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not contain any real training configuration.

<SATISFIED>: The file `results/tracking_results.txt` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree, and its content has been confirmed (though it contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)`). The requirement is that tracking results are saved as `results/tracking_results.txt`, and this file does exist at that path.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kwamba matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV. Ingawa saraka ya `results/videos/` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, trajekta haina kumbukumbu yoyote ya utekelezaji wa OpenCV kwa ajili ya kuonyesha matokeo, wala uhifadhi wa faili za video katika saraka hiyo. Faili za msimbo zilizopo (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) hazijachunguzwa kwa undani ili kuthibitisha uwepo wa OpenCV, na mwongozo wa tathmini unabainisha wazi kwamba haiwezekani kuthibitisha kama utekelezaji wa OpenCV ulifanikiwa au hata ulianza.

judge_stats.criteria: Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/object_tracking_report.md` exists in the workspace, but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — a placeholder tuple string with no actual content. It does not contain any detailed Markdown documentation covering data processing, model training, or evaluation processes. The requirement calls for a comprehensive Markdown document with substantive information about these three areas, which is clearly absent.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The Markdown report file (`results/object_tracking_report.md`) was generated by `train.py`'s `save_expected_artifacts()` function, which only writes the placeholder text `"generated by minimal semantic train.py\n"`. There is no actual analysis of the effects of different hyperparameters on tracking performance. The `train.py` file itself contains no hyperparameter tuning logic, no experiments comparing different learning rates or batch sizes, and no results to analyze. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no hyperparameter analysis section was implemented in the report.
